codeReview.summary: The routed app shell implementation matches the milestone contract: authenticated routes render inside a shared sidebar layout, unauthenticated access redirects to login with deep-link preservation, root redirects to /studies, login/signup live inside the router, and the authenticated fallback/placeholder routes are covered by tests and browser verification. No blocking or non-blocking code issues were identified in the reviewed commit.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Convex password-auth verification also depends on JWT_PRIVATE_KEY and JWKS being configured on the Convex deployment; the shared environment notes only document root .env.local variables, so the worker had to discover and set the missing deployment keys during verification.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: app-shell-routing handoff skillFeedback notes that browser verification was blocked until JWT_PRIVATE_KEY and JWKS were configured; .factory/library/environment.md currently lists CONVEX_DEPLOYMENT, CONVEX_URL, and CONVEX_SITE_URL but not the auth signing keys.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The fullstack-worker procedure assumes every fullstack feature should begin with backend-first Convex tests, but this routing-focused milestone task required mostly frontend routing work plus auth configuration, leading to a justified deviation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: app-shell-routing handoff.skillFeedback.deviations[0] explains the routing task skipped new Convex tests; .factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md step 3 mandates backend-first work before frontend.
